texto: Prefer the familiar word to the far-fetched. Prefer the concrete word to the abstract. Prefer the single word to the circumlocution. Prefer the short word to the long. Prefer the Saxon word to the Romance.
explicacao: Citação de Henry Fowler sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Prefer the familiar word to the far-fetched. Prefer the concrete word to the abstract. Prefer the…” articula reflexao, writing-advice, prefer em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
